title: Classic Saudi Arabian Lamb Kebabs
description: Experience the authentic flavors of Saudi Arabia with these delicious lamb kebabs, marinated in a blend of spices and grilled to perfection. Serve with your favorite sides for a truly memorable meal.

ingredients.name: Lamb shoulder or leg, cut into 1.5 inch cubes
ingredients.notes: Make sure the lamb is at room temperature before marinating.

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality olive oil for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Lemon juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed lemon juice is best.

ingredients.name: Garlic, minced
ingredients.notes: Use a microplane grater for the best results.

ingredients.name: Cumin
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality ground cumin for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Coriander
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality ground coriander for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Cayenne pepper
ingredients.notes: Adjust the heat level to your liking.

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper
ingredients.notes: Use freshly ground black pepper for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: Use fresh parsley for the best flavor and color.

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until they are cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the kebabs to a plate and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as rice, salad, or grilled vegetables.
Enjoy your delicious Saudi Arabian lamb kebabs!
